app.name: Propel ROI
login.title: Propel ROI
login.magic_description: Enter your Factorial email to receive a login link
login.check_body: We sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Click the link to activate your account.
login.magic_hint: We'll send you a secure link. No password needed.
home.empty: No sessions yet. Create your first one!
prospect.title: Prospect details
prospect.subtitle: Enter the basics about this prospect.
prospect.hubspot_paste_first: Paste the HubSpot deal link first
ai_assist.title: AI Pain Assistant
ai_assist.subtitle: Paste your discovery call notes and let AI suggest relevant pains.
ai_assist.placeholder: e.g. 'The HR director mentioned they spend 3 hours per week on manual payroll corrections. They also have high turnover in their Madrid office and struggle with onboarding...'
ai_assist.no_pains: No specific pains identified. You can select them manually on the next screen.
ai_assist.error: AI suggestion failed — you can select pains manually
ai_assist.hubspot_summary: AI-generated summary of the main pains from your deal notes. You can edit before mapping.
pains.title: Select pains
pains.subtitle: Choose the pains your prospect experiences. ({{count}} selected)
quantify.title: Quantify impact
quantify.subtitle: Adjust values per pain to estimate annual savings.
offering.title: Configure offering
offering.subtitle: Pick a bundle and add-ons to cover the prospect's pains.
offering.addons_subtitle: Toggle modules on/off. Use + to add modules not tied to pains.
offering.add_module_hint: Select a module to add to the configuration
offering.no_addons_needed: All required modules are covered by the selected bundle. Use + to add more.
offering.no_bundles: No bundles available for this country.
offering.constraint_core_mandatory: Core HR is mandatory and must be included.
offering.constraint_time_paired: Time Off and Time Tracking must be added together.
offering.constraint_recruitment_seats: Recruitment requires a minimum of 100 seats.
offering.constraint_no_enterprise: {{module}} is not available on Enterprise tier.
offering.no_sector_data: Select a sector in Prospect step for personalised recommendations.
offering.cost_only: Cost only -- not linked to any pain
benchmarks.title: Industry benchmarks
benchmarks.subtitle: Compare with similar companies in your sector.
benchmarks.no_data: No benchmark data available for this sector and country.
benchmarks.no_sector: Select a sector in the Prospect step to see benchmarks.

offering.roi_subtitle: Choose a pack, customize modules, and review the ROI
hyp.title: Check Hypothesis
express.skip_analysis: I already have the modules agreed with the prospect
express.slide_preview_sub: Live preview of the summary slide — updates as you edit
express.not_found_hubspot: Not found in atlas — searching HubSpot...
express.not_found: Deal not found — select modules manually
express.enhance_dialog_desc: Paste the meeting notes and AI will extract real quotes and pain points mapped to each module and stakeholder.
tutorial.click_express: Tap ROI Express to start a test ROI
tutorial.step1_body: Tap here to start a new ROI Express analysis. Paste the HubSpot deal link and generate the ROI in minutes.
tutorial.step2_body: Here you'll find all the ROI analyses you've created. Tap any to view, edit or share.
tutorial.express_step0_body: Paste a HubSpot deal URL, or just type the company name and skip to modules.
tutorial.express_step1_body: Pick the Factorial modules to include in the ROI. You can use a bundle or select individually.
tutorial.express_step2_body: Set headcounts, hourly costs, and annual Factorial price. These drive the savings calculation.
tutorial.express_step3_body: Review the result, download the PDF, or share the link with your prospect.
cocreation.title: ROI Co-creation
cocreation.subtitle: Build the ROI live with your prospect
cocreation.discovery_sub: Ask these questions during the call and note the hours per stakeholder
cocreation.expense_submitters_label: Number of employees who submit expenses
cocreation.pricing_sub: Enter the annual Factorial cost to calculate ROI
cocreation.personalize_sub: Search the ROI co-creation call from Modjo to personalize the detail presentation

cocreation.personalized_sub: The detail PDF uses real quotes from the meeting
cocreation.personalize_cta: Use meeting notes from Modjo to personalize the detail PDF
onboarding.lang_sub: You can change this later in Settings

login.signup_description: Create your account to get started
login.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters

login.reset_sent: Password reset link sent to your email
login.password_changed: Password changed. You can now log in.
onboarding.s1_body: Many deals stall because we never reach the Economic Buyer. A personalized ROI gives the decision-maker real numbers to justify the investment.
onboarding.s2_body: When you build the ROI live with the prospect, they own the numbers — and you uncover pain points no slide deck would reveal.
onboarding.s3_body: Import deal → Select modules → Co-create during the call → Download branded PDF deck.
onboarding.s4_body:
Hours saved/month × People × Hourly cost × 12 = Annual savings.

Example: 5 HR admins × 6h/month × €30/h × 12 = €10,800/year.
onboarding.h1_body: Paste the HubSpot deal link. The AI fetches context, contacts, and communication history automatically — emails, calls, and notes.
onboarding.h2_body: Choose the Factorial modules your prospect needs. Set headcounts and hourly costs per stakeholder type (employees, HR, managers).
onboarding.h3_body: During the discovery call, adjust hours per stakeholder based on what the prospect tells you. Ask: 'How many hours a month do you spend on X?' The ROI updates live.
onboarding.h4_body: Generate a branded Factorial PDF — 1-pager summary or full detail with calculation breakdown per module. Ready to send to the Economic Buyer.
onboarding.tour_body: We can walk you through the app step by step — see where to create an ROI, how the flow works, and where your sessions live.
tour.cocreate_body: Click here to start co-creating an ROI. Import a deal, select modules, and build the ROI live during a discovery call.
tour.sessions_body: All your co-created ROIs live here. Click any to view, edit, or download the deck.
onboarding.s1_problem: Too many deals are lost because we never reach the Economic Buyer — the CEO, CFO, or whoever signs off on the budget. We stay convincing a champion who can't approve.
onboarding.s1_solution: A personalized ROI makes the savings tangible. It gives the decision-maker numbers they can't ignore — the difference between 'Factorial is good' and 'Factorial saves us €100k/year'.
onboarding.s2_intro: A generic ROI convinces no one. But when you build it with the prospect — listening to their processes, their numbers, their frustrations — the result is completely different:
onboarding.s2_point1: Present a real ROI based on data they gave you themselves
onboarding.s2_point2: Project the prospect into the concrete benefits of Factorial
onboarding.s2_point3: The Economic Buyer understands the savings are real — their team validated them
onboarding.s3_stage1_sub: Paste HubSpot link to save context and deal data
onboarding.s3_stage3_sub: Adjust hours per stakeholder based on what they tell you
onboarding.s3_stage4_sub: PDF ready to send to the Economic Buyer
onboarding.s4_intro: For each module and employee type, savings are calculated like this:
onboarding.s5_body: Take a guided tour of the tool or go straight to co-creating your first ROI.
feedback.title: Report an issue
tour.demo_step0: This is where you paste a HubSpot deal link. For the demo, click Continue.
tour.demo_step1: Select the modules for your prospect. We pre-selected Core and Time Tracking.
tour.demo_step2: Configure headcounts and hourly costs. These are pre-filled for the demo.
tour.demo_step3: In a real call, you'd adjust hours per stakeholder here. Click through to see the result.
tour.demo_step4: Here's your ROI! Download the PDF or adjust the Factorial pricing.
tour.t1_body:
This guided tour walks you through a real example. We've pre-loaded a demo company with Absences module. You'll co-create the ROI step by step — exactly like a real discovery call.

Let's start!
tour.t2_body:
Paste the HubSpot deal URL here. The AI fetches company name, sector, and communication history automatically.

For this demo, it's already filled in. Click Continue.
tour.t3_body:
Choose which Factorial modules your prospect needs. We've selected Absences.

In a real session, pick based on what you heard in the discovery call.
tour.t4_body:
Set number of employees, HR admins, and managers. These drive the calculation.

In a real call, ask: 'How many people are in HR? How many managers approve things?'
tour.t5_body:
For each module, ask how many hours per month the stakeholder spends on this task.

Left panel: suggested questions to ask.
Right panel: enter the hours they give you.

Tip: 'How many hours does your HR team spend on leave balance calculations each month?'
tour.t6_body:
As you enter hours, the ROI updates in real time.

Formula: hours saved × people × hourly cost × 12 = annual savings.

This number is based entirely on data the prospect gave you — it's theirs.
tour.t7_body:
Generate a branded PDF:
• 1-Pager: summary for the Economic Buyer
• Full detail: module breakdown

Send the 1-pager to the CFO/CEO. Use the full detail in your follow-up.
tour.t8_body:
After the call, search for the recording in Modjo. The AI reads the transcript and replaces generic descriptions with real quotes from the prospect.

Instead of 'HR spends time on leave' it writes 'Montse spends 3 days a month reconciling leave in Excel before sending to the gestoría'. Personal. Hard to ignore.
tour.t9_body:
The full flow:

1. Import deal from HubSpot
2. Select modules
3. Configure headcount
4. Co-create hours on the call
5. Download deck
6. Enhance with Modjo transcript

Explore the demo or start a real ROI!
